headline: IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
summary: IQVIA (IQV) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +2.66% and +1.62%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: IQVIA’s (NYSE:IQV) Q1 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates
summary: Clinical research company IQVIA (NYSE: IQV) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 8.4% year on year to $4.15 billion. The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $17.25 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.90 per share was 2.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: IQVIA Reports First-Quarter 2026 Results
summary: RESEARCH TRIANGLE PARK, N.C., May 05, 2026--IQVIA Holdings Inc. ("IQVIA") (NYSE:IQV), a leading global provider of clinical research services, commercial insights and healthcare intelligence to the life sciences and healthcare industries, today reported financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
